known_issues.description: Integrated terminal uses xterm.js but platform pty bridge is incomplete
known_issues.reproduction_steps: Open View → Terminal. Shell spawns but PTY events may lag.

known_issues.description: Extension host may fail for macOS-specific extensions
Keychain integration mapped to libsecret — some credentials may need re-entry

workarounds.description: Use an external terminal emulator for heavy terminal workloads

notes: Major features (editor, search, git, debugging) functional. Integrated terminal and keychain integration are degraded. App remains usable for primary editing workflows.
